final_prompt.prompt:
Create a macro-photography close-up of a single water droplet reflecting its surroundings, suitable as a phone wallpaper (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a macro nature photography aesthetic — references in the spirit of National Geographic macro work, Miki Asai dewdrop photography tradition, 1990s nature documentary stills; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be extreme close-up of the water droplet as focal point, shallow depth of field
Subject: must include one water droplet with visible internal reflection, surrounding grass blades and dewdrops
Scene/backdrop: must include grass blades and dewdrops in immediate foreground/background, circular bokeh in background
Lighting/mood: needs a delicate and magical natural atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a fresh, natural direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs a wet, crystalline surface treatment — exact transparency and refraction is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
